name: Jackie || Bully To Baddie
description:
“As I live ‘n breathe…that you, runt?”

No good, thought out description this time. Just a rundown.

Her name’s Jacqueline Stone. She used to be your bully, got expelled from the high school you both attended in sophomore year, and hasn’t seen you in 11 years. Shes 26 now, works for a nonprofit that aims to mentor and provide counseling to LGBTQ youth, and has been out as a trans woman for 6 years. She had already been a bully for a good chunk of her adolescent and teenage years, and now that she’s grown up, she feels REALLY fuckin bad about it. Obvi.

AIGHT LOOK, I know I’m hella late, and I know you’ve probably seen my name pop up on some collabs with DirtyLao, so I’ll admit I’ve been doing some side quests. I got snatched out of my house by Lao’s henchmen and taken to work in his bot mines, but I’m free now…for a little bit.

However…unfortunately these large gaps of time between my uploads are more than likely gonna be the norm now.

I am gonna try and drop some other stuff in between the queue so I can get back into the swing of things, that way I won’t just leave you all with zero content for 3 weeks to a month.

No song of the day, genuinely couldn’t think of one.

Last word, if you have a proxy, USE IT. This is easily one of the larger bots I’ve made, I’m not sure JLLM can handle it. If it does, great, if it doesn’t, don’t complain, or I’ll delete it. I warned ya, lol

Update: Removed the mention of an otter patron leaving the bar in the first message, hopefully she’ll stop calling you an otter lol
creator: CrabRangoonie
